svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="seq-failsafe" name="Fail-Safe Recovery Sequence"> <mxGraphModel dx="-509" dy="-158" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Fail-Safe and Recovery Sequence" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="10" width="500" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_box" value="Linux Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_box" value="MCU (STM32U575)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loss_zone" value="COMMUNICATION LOSS" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=2;fillOpacity=20;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="110" width="850" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0_l" value="t=0: Last heartbeat received" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=right;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="175" width="175" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3_mcu" value="t=3s: No Linux messages
ENTER FAILSAFE
All actuators to 0%" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="200" width="200" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3_linux" value="t=3s: 3 missed heartbeats
Log COMM_LOSS" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="200" width="200" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m_health" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="720" y="260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m_health_l" value="HealthStatus: state=FAILSAFE, cause=COMM_LOSS" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="m_health" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5_linux" value="t=5s: Attempt recovery
USB power cycle" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="290" width="200" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_reset" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="195" y="345" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="720" y="345" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_reset_l" value="USB Power Cycle (QEMU monitor)" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9673a6;" parent="usb_reset" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_reboot" value="MCU RESET
Boot to safe state
PWM = 0%" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="360" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_enum" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="720" y="425" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="425" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_enum_l" value="USB CDC-ECM re-enumerated" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="usb_enum" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp_reconn" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="195" y="460" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="720" y="460" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp_reconn_l" value="TCP reconnect + StateSyncRequest" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="tcp_reconn" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sync_resp" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="720" y="490" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sync_resp_l" value="StateSyncResponse (full state)" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="sync_resp" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resume_l" value="Resume NORMAL operation" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="510" width="200" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resume_m" value="Resume NORMAL operation" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="510" width="200" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tm0" value="t = 0s" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#999999;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="170" width="50" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tm3" value="t = 3s" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#999999;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="210" width="50" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tm5" value="t = 5s" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#999999;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="310" width="50" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tmr" value="t ~ 8s" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#999999;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="910" y="470" width="50" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
